name: Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb ground turkey breast, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cook lasagna noodles according to package directions; set aside to cool.
3. To prepare sauce, cook turkey, onions, bell peppers, and garlic in a saucepan over medium heat until the meat is no longer pink and vegetables are tender. Drain excess fat.
4. Stir in stewed tomatoes, no-salt-added tomato sauce, tomato paste, basil, oregano, salt, and black pepper into the saucepan. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. To prepare filling, combine egg whites, fat-free cottage cheese, 1/4 cup fat-free parmesan cheese, and parsley in a bowl.
7. Layer half of the cooked noodles in a 12 x 7 x 2-inch (30 x 18 x 5 cm) baking dish.
8. Spread half of the filling mixture over the noodles.
9. Top with half of the sauce and half of the mozzarella cheese.
10. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
11. Sprinkle with the remaining fat-free parmesan cheese.
12. Cover the dish and bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes or until heated through.
